info.title: MGM Asset Library API
info.description: REST API for the MGM Asset Library — feature complete (Parts 1 + 2 + 3 + 4).

email.description: Only present when the requester is the user themselves or an admin.

unreadNotifications.description: Stub returns 0 until Part 3 notification fan-out lands.

keycloakAccessToken.description: Bearer token obtained from Keycloak in the plugin loopback flow.

slug.description: Slug. Server enforces uniqueness; rejected after publish.

semver.description: Semver of the latest version. Routed to the latest AssetVersion row, not the Asset itself. Locked after publish.

previewMedia.description: Owner-curated preview gallery. Array of `{ id, kind, key, label, mime, viewUrl? }`. `viewUrl` is ignored on write — the backend always re-signs from `key`.

assetCount.description: Count of published assets in this category.

iconKey.description: S3 key for an SVG / small PNG icon.

usageCount.description: Number of assets currently using this tag.

releaseNotes.description: TipTap JSON keyed by locale: { en?, id? }.

orderedFileIds.description: File ids in the desired display order.

reason.description: Required moderator reason recorded in the audit log.
Required moderator reason recorded in the audit log.

intendedUse.description: How will this asset be used internally?

customBannerKey.description: S3 key for a custom banner (use the initiate upload endpoint).

customShortDescription.description: { en?, id? } overrides for the short description.
